title: Charlotte Custom GUI Pack
body:
![Charlotte Custom GUI Pack](https://i.imgur.com/x4cvET9.png)

**Compatibility:** This resource pack is GUI-only and can be used alongside other resource packs. Just place it on top of the resource pack you use.

**About:** This custom GUI pack is themed after the heart-touching show "Charlotte." I've made changes to the hot bar and experimented with adding different pictures to each container. The chosen color palette is red and white, If you encounter any bugs, please report them, and I'll address them promptly. You can contact me on my discord server

**Join Our Discord:** Explore our Discord server where you can suggest and vote for the next pack, participate in anime discussions.[Join Here](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph)
